ABOUT THE BRAND

Sandro gives Parisian chic a rock 'n' roll spin. Since launching her brand in 1984, founder and Artistic Director Evelyne Chétrite has paid homage to her Moroccan roots and shirt-making grandfather through her use of rich colors and impeccable tailoring in Sandro's ready-to-wear and accessories collections. From structured leather jackets and faded jeans to silk blouses and lace-trimmed mini dresses, every Sandro piece is effortlessly cool and endlessly wearable. Since 2008, Chétrite's son Ilan has headed up Sandro Homme, a casual yet sophisticated men's collection that stays true to the label's elevated urban aesthetic.
